permissions.comment: Geocoding (place search / reverse geocode) is routed through the native HTTP client so it bypasses the WebView's CORS — public Nominatim's CDN intermittently omits the CORS header on cached responses, which the WebView rejects as 'Search failed'. Also lets us send a User-Agent as Nominatim's policy requires. Scoped to the built-in geocoder provider hosts only (keep in sync with the GEOCODING_PROVIDERS registry / lib/geocoding-fetch.ts); custom/self-hosted endpoints fall back to the browser fetch.
